options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -additional_individual_violation_report
options.description: {true|false} Report calculated duty ratio in addition with applied duty ratio in report file.

options.name: -avgRecovery
options.description: override QRC tech em_recover factor for all layers used in Iavg limits.

options.name: -check_thermal_aware_em
options.description: check thermal aware EM

options.name: -current_scale_factor
options.description: Scale Signal EM current, syntax: -current_scale_factor { [rms <rms_value>] [peak <peak_value>] [avg <avg_value>] }

options.name: -current_scale_table
options.description: <current_scale_table_file> Specifies the layer-based scale table for current

options.name: -default_freq_for_unconstrained_nets
options.description: <freq_in_Hz> Specifies the frequency for EM calculation when a net has no defined frequency or a defined frequency of 0Hz in the design. Unit: Hz.

options.name: -delta_T
options.description: maximum change in temperature allowed in units of Celsius. Used in the QRC tech for RMS limits. Default=5.

options.name: -delta_T_layer_list
options.description: Specifies layer based delta temperature for EM RMS currnet limit analysis

options.name: -detailed
options.description: Generates a detailed report containing information for all signal nets, including those without violations

options.name: -effort_level
options.description: Enum_list legal values are: low, medium, high. Default: low.

options.name: -em_cdf_percentage
options.description: Specify em cumulative distribution factor (cdf) percentage.

options.name: -em_limit_scale_factor
options.description: Scale Signal EM limit, syntax: -em_limit_scale_factor { [rms <rms_value>] [peak <peak_value>] [avg <avg_value>] }

options.name: -em_limit_scale_table
options.description: <em_limit_scale_table_file> Specifies the layer-based scale table for em_limit

options.name: -em_res_width
options.description: Specifies width used to get EM limit. enum_list legal values are: drawn, silicon. Default: drawn.

options.name: -em_temperature
options.description: Specifies the temperature used to lookup the temperature scaling factor. By default, no scaling is done. Unit: Celsius.

options.name: -em_temperature_layer_list
options.description: Specifies layer based EM temperature for EM AVG current limit analysis

options.name: -em_threshold
options.description: The value is the ratio of signal current (avg/peak/rms) to the respective EM limit. Default: 1.0.

options.name: -enable_seb
options.description: Enable SEB calculation

options.name: -env_temperature
options.description: environment temperature. Unit: Celsius.

options.name: -error
options.description: Specifies the maximam number of errors to report.

options.name: -extraction_tech_file
options.description: Specify qrcTechFile name.

options.name: -forceHoldView
options.description: Turn this on to force hold view.

options.name: -handle_pin_obs_via
options.description: Turn on to handle pin obs via.

options.name: -ict_em_models
options.description: Specify ict EM file to provide EM rule if EM rule not exists in qrcTechFile.

options.name: -Ipeak_Td_method
options.description: {effective_width_from_integration|effective_half_peak_width|max_equivalent_dc_peak|sum_half_peak_width} Specifies Td calculation method for Ipeak check. enum_list legal values are: effective_width_from_integration, effective_half_peak_width, max_equivalent_dc_peak, sum_half_peak_width. Default: effective_width_from_integration.

options.name: -ircx_models
options.description: Specify ircx model file.

options.name: -lifetime
options.description: Specifies the hours of operation used to lookup the lifetime scaling factor. By default, no scaling is done. Unit: hour.

options.name: -method
options.description: Specifies the current waveform calculation method, check one or more of Irms, Ipeak, and Iavg limits. enum_list legal values are: rms, peak, avg. Default: rms.

options.name: -min_net_freq_file
options.description: Specify minimum net freq file for user input net frequency by regular expression.

options.name: -minPeakDutyRatio
options.description: Do not check Ipeak for nets with duty ratio below <duty_ratio>. default = 0.05, range 0.0 to 1.0.

options.name: -minPeakFreq
options.description: Do not check Ipeak for nets with frequency below <freq> in units of hertz. default = 1e6. Unit: Hz.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies whether to check named or selected nets

options.name: -net_file
options.description: Specifies from file the net to check in signalEM analysis

options.name: -net_freq_file
options.description: Specify net freq file for user input net frequency.

options.name: -read_detail_delta_temperature_file
options.description: <filename> Specify detail delta temperature file for thermal aware checking.

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for the violation data

options.name: -report_db
options.description: Enable writing a db file to store data for GUI display.

options.name: -seb_lifetime
options.description: Specifies the hours of operation. By default, it's 5 years. Unit : hour.

options.name: -seb_table
options.description: Specify seb table file.

options.name: -seb_temperature
options.description: Specifies the temperature of operation. By default, it's 110c. Unit: Celsius.

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specifies whether to check named or selected nets

options.name: -set_current_file
options.description: Specify current file to provide currents for cell/instance's pin.

options.name: -simulation_net
options.description: Specifies a list of nets to use simulation mode

options.name: -simulation_net_file
options.description: <simulation_net_file> Specifies a file contained a list of nets to use simulation mode

options.name: -skip_category_mode
options.description: Specify the mode that under which condition a net should be skipped and which category a skipped net belongs to.

options.name: -skip_net
options.description: Specifies the net to be skipped in signalEM analysis

options.name: -skip_net_file
options.description: Specifies the net to be skipped in signalEM analysis

options.name: -toggle
options.description: Specifies the toggle rate for signal nets

options.name: -use_rms_delta_t
options.description: Turn on to use rms delta temperature.

options.name: -useQrcTech
options.description: Turn this on to force Irms checks to use the QRC tech file rather than the LEF tech. If either Ipeak or Iavg is also checked, then all checks will use the QRC tech file, including Irms.

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the name of the view
